MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Todd Rothbard, Esq. for Plaintiff: 90 New Montgomery Partners, L.P., present by Alex Cyriac.
Robert Plat, Esq. for Defendants: Guara Kapuria and Abdul Farid, ind. and dba. Quizno's Classic Subs., not present.
No appearance by Defaulted Co-Defendant: Nadera Mohabbat, ind. and dba Quizno's Classic Subs.
-Case Settled as to Defendant: Guara Kapuria, Stipulation and Order signed by the parties and filed in court, see scanned doc. for details.
-Proof-Up as to None appearing Defendant: Abdul Farid and Defaulted Defendant: Nadera Mohabbat. After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against All Defendants for Restitution and possession of the property located at 90 New Montgomery St., Suite R-003, San Francisco. Forfeiture of the lease agreement.
Money Judgement against Defendants: Farid and Mohabbat as follows:
Back-Rent and Damages $54,253.59
Attorney's Fees $4,800.00 and Costs $415.00, for a Total of $59,468.59
Judgment signed in open court.
